series_metadata.series_title: Workpapers Related To Compilations/GAAP Conversion and Other Specific Single Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Financial work papers producing all engaged reports for public entities including governing boards, districts, libraries, villages, townships, cities, counties and school districts generated under the cash or GAAP basis of accounting. Single, small scope reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain while needed then destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy ; Electronic: Retain 8 years from the scope period end date, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
